name: web-browser
description: Full in-app browser with multi-tab URLs, forward/back navigation, and port-on-host shortcuts. Works against any web framework — React, Vue, Next.js, FastAPI, Go, Rails, etc.

configSchema.label: URL
configSchema.description: Full URL to open (any framework, any host). Takes priority over the Port field.

configSchema.label: Port
configSchema.description: Port on the OpenDray server — host is auto-filled from your connection. Used only when URL above is empty.
